---
title: "Clifford Wyndham Holgate"
---

## Clifford Wyndham Holgate

**Dates:** 1859-1903

### Description

local historian

### Biography

He was an old boy of Winchester College and published extensively on that subject, on bibliography and on local history.

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st [1897?]
- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from May 26th 1896

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
